highlights.text: On Tuesday I was looking for a push back up the range , writing Monday at 4pm: “Bull case tomorrow: No change.
The bull case is that we just work this back up to the upside.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the classic failed breakdown - my core setup - we had on Monday evening at 630PM which got me long into today (provided to readers into advance).

post_title: [Re-Send] New ATHS For SPX, But Will CPI Tomorrow Spoil The Party? Oct 10 Plan
